---
title: ""
---

<div class="bio-grid">
<div>
<img src="photo.jpeg" alt="Austėja Kažemekaitytė">
</div>
<div>

<div class="bio-name">Austėja Kažemekaitytė</div>
<div class="bio-role">Postdoctoral Fellow · University of Trento</div>

I am a behavioural and experimental economist. My research focuses primarily on sustainability and consumer decision making. I design, program, and run lab, online, and lab-in-the-field experiments, and I am currently part of the [VISIONARY](https://visionary-project.eu) project (EU H2020).

<div class="interests">
<span class="interest-tag">Behavioural economics</span>
<span class="interest-tag">Experimental methods</span>
<span class="interest-tag">Sustainable food choice</span>
<span class="interest-tag">Consumer decision making</span>
<span class="interest-tag">Discrete choice experiments</span>
<span class="interest-tag">Psychophysiological measures</span>
</div>

<div class="bio-links">
<span class="bio-email">a.kazemekaityte[at]unitn.it</span>
·
<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=lt&user=lYP-9RcAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a>
·
<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9036-418X">ORCID</a>
·
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/austejakazemekaityte/">LinkedIn</a>
·
<a href="https://github.com/AustejaK">GitHub</a>
·
<a class="cv-btn" href="CV.pdf" download>Download CV</a>
</div>

</div>
</div>
